title: Hypothesizer agent doc must declare `hypothesis` / `causal_story` length limits (30-800 chars)
source: Loop A tick 12 (T012D2). Final DA-retry proposal's `causal_story` came in at 1275 chars; pre-flight rejected with `causal_story length 1275 not in [30, 800]`. The hypothesizer was never told the limit — [phase5/proposal.py:231-235](phase5/proposal.py#L231-L235) enforces 30 <= len <= 800 on both `hypothesis` and `causal_story`, but [.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md](.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md) and the SKILL.md spec don't mention it. Manual trim to 778 chars passed pre-flight cleanly (verified during the same session) — content was preservable.
why: Fourth stacked gap on the Loop A audit-dispatch path discovered today (after B0038 schema, B0039 asset-injection, B0040 codegen). Each unfixed gap costs a tick's worth of hypothesizer + DA dispatches before surfacing. Without B0041, every verbose-causal_story PROCEED-survivor pre-flight-fails on the same trivial constraint, just like T012D2 did.
value_rationale: M (avoids one retry cycle per occurrence; lower priority than B0040 which blocks ALL custom-primary survivors).
scope: Update [.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md](.claude/agents/phase5-hypothesizer.md) §schema requirements to explicitly state: `hypothesis` and `causal_story` MUST each be 30-800 chars. Suggest the agent target ~600-700 chars for `causal_story` to leave margin for DA-retry insertions.

Optional: surface the validation error one stage earlier (in `stage_review`) so the loop catches it before pre-flight subprocess overhead. Currently `Proposal.validate()` runs inside `phase5.run_proposal`; could mirror the call in `scripts/loop_a_tick.py::stage_review`.
out_of_scope: relaxing the 800-char limit. Longer narrative belongs in a separate `extended_rationale` field if needed (future work).

history.reason: feat(B0040+B0041+tick12): first end-to-end audit + 4th audit-path gap
feat(B0040+B0041+tick12): first end-to-end audit + 4th audit-path gap
Pick-up after B0036 closure: XS effort, M value, no blockers. Doc updates likely already partially shipped; verify and add stage_review earlier-fail.

SKILL.md proposal schema updated with 30-800 char limit + ~600-700 target guidance; stage_review now calls load_proposal().validate() before DA dispatch, raising RuntimeError with trim instructions on length violations (saves a multi-minute DA subprocess for trivial schema errors). Regression test suite tests/phase5/test_b0041_proposal_length_validation.py (4 tests) pins the validator behavior. Agent doc already had the limits from the prior bundled commit 262a2da. 50/50 phase5 tests pass.
